practiceChallenge.title: Fill in the fast-and-slow outcomes
practiceChallenge.description: Complete the helper so it returns the right clue for each fast-and-slow pattern outcome.
hints: If fast reaches the end, there is no cycle.
If fast meets slow, there is a loop.
If the number process reaches 1, the number is happy.
practiceChallenge.successMessage: Nice work. Your fast-and-slow clues match the visible tests.
practiceChallenge.retryMessage: Not yet. Recheck what end, meeting, and reaching 1 each mean.

blanks.label: Meaning when fast reaches the end
Meaning when the number process reaches 1
